services.title: Hatha Yoga Classes
services.body: Beginner-friendly classes focusing on basic poses and breathing techniques.

services.title: Yoga Workshops
services.body: Specialized workshops for advanced practitioners, covering various yoga styles.

services.title: Prenatal Yoga
services.body: Classes designed to support pregnant women through their pregnancy journey.

services.title: Morning Flow Sessions
services.body: Start your day with a refreshing morning yoga session.

services.title: Private Yoga Lessons
services.body: Personalized one-on-one sessions tailored to your specific needs and goals.

services.title: Yoga & Meditation Retreats
services.body: Weekend retreats focusing on yoga, meditation, and relaxation techniques.

faqs.a: Yes, all our instructors are RYT certified and members of Yoga Alliance.
Absolutely. We provide personalized one-on-one sessions for a tailored experience.
We require 24 hours notice for class cancellations to avoid charges.

faqs.q: Can I bring my own mat?
faqs.a: Yes, you are welcome to bring your own yoga mat. We also provide mats if needed.
